research_question: Within matched post-IPO board and absolute listing-quarter cohorts, do non-lucky-code A-shares outperform lucky-code peers over the next independent monthly open-to-open interval after fixed round-trip friction?
null_hypothesis: For each gated split, the population mean monthly net return difference between the frozen NOT_LUCKY and paired LUCKY baskets is less than or equal to zero.
economic_mechanism: Numerologically attractive security codes may attract attention and optimistic demand around young listings; exact board, absolute listing quarter and liquidity-ordinal matching asks whether avoiding that attribute improves the following independent monthly return without treating the code as causal proof.

forbidden_repairs: change lucky digits, forbidden digit, suffix length or exchange rule
change board, absolute listing-quarter, liquidity pairing or pair count
change IPO-age bounds, decision, entry, exit, friction, splits, inference or gates
add ST, regime, industry, size, momentum, volatility, quality or valuation filters
infer or backfill an unobserved ordinary security

input_identity.snapshot_receipt_resolution: relative to the parent directory of the frozen database
input_identity.calendar_coverage: 2018-01-02 through 2026-06-30, exact date-set parity with the frozen canonical snapshot

cohort_coverage_disclosure.runtime_rule: recompute all three counts from independently validated master and snapshot sets; unobserved equals exact master set difference and is never inferred
cohort_coverage_disclosure.interpretation: the screen describes only the observed snapshot cohort and is neither PIT-complete nor full-universe evidence

universe.scope: observed frozen-snapshot SSE/SZSE ordinary A-shares on Main, STAR and ChiNext boards only

ipo_age_accepted_sessions_inclusive.definition: count from the first accepted session on or after list_date through D, inclusive

universe.historical_st: unknown and deliberately not a filter
universe.complete_input_rule: master identity, D and its prior 19 consecutive accepted-session amount rows, and all selected entry/exit qfq rows must be unique, finite where numeric, positive where required, non-synthetic, hash-valid and carry the exact frozen quality classification; adj_factor must be positive on every required bar row
universe.missing_or_conflicting_input: INPUT_BLOCKED; never infer, fill, silently drop or replace after observing aggregates

feature_contract.decision_date: D, the final accepted session of each calendar month
feature_contract.trailing_liquidity: median amount over D and its prior 19 consecutive accepted sessions
feature_contract.listing_cohort: board crossed with absolute list_date calendar YYYYQ; cohorts are never relative-age buckets

lucky_code.SH: last three numeric code digits contain at least one of 6, 8 or 9 and contain no 4
lucky_code.SZ: last four numeric code digits contain at least one of 6, 8 or 9 and contain no 4

feature_contract.within_side_ranking: within each board x absolute list YYYYQ x LUCKY/NOT_LUCKY side, prior-20 median amount descending then ts_code ascending
feature_contract.pairing: pair LUCKY and NOT_LUCKY rows at the same zero-based within-side ordinal; unmatched rows are not replaced
feature_contract.pair_pool_ranking: minimum of the two side median amounts descending, then NOT_LUCKY ts_code ascending, then LUCKY ts_code ascending; no tolerance or tie expansion
feature_contract.incomplete_month: retain as invalid; fewer than 15 pairs forces STRUCTURAL_FAIL

synthetic_interval.entry: qfq_open on the first accepted session after D
synthetic_interval.exit: qfq_open on the first accepted session after the next calendar month-end
synthetic_interval.split_rule: entry and exit must belong to the same split; crossing intervals are purged
synthetic_interval.strategy_gross: arithmetic mean of the 15 NOT_LUCKY simple qfq open-to-open returns
synthetic_interval.benchmark_gross: arithmetic mean of the 15 ordinal-paired LUCKY simple qfq open-to-open returns
synthetic_interval.forbidden_claims: no cash, shares, lots, capacity, fills, blocked orders, tradability or corporate-action execution claims; qfq is adjusted research measurement only
synthetic_interval.future_executable_or_pit_use: requires a separate shared-engine and corporate-action identity packet

historical_sequential_access: Compute and adjudicate validation first. If any validation gate fails, close permanently without reading or calculating retrospective-holdout returns or statistics. Only an independently accepted validation PASS may authorize the one-time retrospective-holdout calculation; outcome-free preflight may inspect aggregates for both.

inference.prng: NumPy Generator PCG64 through the frozen dependency
inference.p_value: (1 + count(centered bootstrap mean >= observed uncentered mean)) / 10001
inference.lower_bound: observed mean minus the linearly interpolated 0.9833333333333333 quantile of centered bootstrap means
inference.annualized_net_return: exp(sum(log1p(net_return)) * 12 / N) - 1; a nonfinite value or any return at or below -1 fails closed

gates_per_gated_split: minimum complete interval count is met
one-sided Bonferroni p-value is at or below 0.016666666666666666
Bonferroni lower confidence bound is positive
strategy geometric annualized net return exceeds paired LUCKY benchmark geometric annualized net return
historical_pass: The sole variant passes all six gates in validation and, only after accepted validation PASS, retrospective holdout.

outcome_free_preflight.status_rule: INPUT_BLOCKED takes precedence for master, calendar, definition, receipt, window, qfq, adj-factor, duplicate or selected-panel identity failure; otherwise STRUCTURAL_FAIL when any interval has fewer than 15 pairs or a gated split misses its minimum interval count; otherwise PREFLIGHT_PASS
outcome_free_preflight.prohibited_computation: No security identifier, pair, ranking, qfq return, strategy or benchmark interval return, active return, annualized return, bootstrap statistic, performance gate, NAV or signal may be calculated or published.

stop_rules: Any retained month below 15 complete pairs closes the family at preflight; do not relax or skip it.
Do not change cohort, code digits, pairing, ranking, count, holding interval, friction, splits, inference or gates after aggregates or outcomes are observed.
After independently accepted PREFLIGHT_PASS, execute exactly one validation run with a fresh Run ID.
Validation FAIL closes permanently without opening retrospective holdout.
Historical PASS remains non-candidate and stops for external review before any prospective phase.
No entry on or after 2026-07-01 and no prospective observation may be accessed in this phase.
